from pathlib import Path
p = Path\(r"C:/Users/12712/.claude/projects/F--1work-------/c4131582-c5ce-40d5-9392-50659df4264c/tool-results/bxqkex0bk.txt"\)
text = p.read_text\(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)
files=[]
for line in text.splitlines\(\):
    if line.startswith\('diff --git '\):
        parts=line.split\(\)
        if len\(parts\)>=4:
            a=parts[2][2:] if parts[2].startswith\('a/'\) else parts[2]
            b=parts[3][2:] if parts[3].startswith\('b/'\) else parts[3]
            files.append\(\(a,b\)\)
print\('TOTAL_DIFF_LINES', len\(text.splitlines\(\)\)\)
print\('CHANGED_FILES', len\(files\)\)
for i,\(a,b\) in enumerate\(files,1\):
    print\(f"{i:02d}. {a} -> {b}"\)
PY)

Bash(python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re
p=Path\(r"C:/Users/12712/.claude/projects/F--1work-------/c4131582-c5ce-40d5-9392-50659df4264c/tool-results/bxqkex0bk.txt"\)
text=p.read_text\(encoding='utf-8',errors='replace'\).splitlines\(\)
file='server/src/routes/ai.js'
inside=False
for line in text:
    if line.startswith\('diff --git '\):
        m=re.match\(r'diff --git a/\(.*?\) b/\(.*\)',line\)
        if inside and m:
            break
        inside=\(m and m.group\(2\)==file\)
    if inside:
        print\(line\)
PY)

Bash(python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re
p=Path\(r"C:/Users/12712/.claude/projects/F--1work-------/c4131582-c5ce-40d5-9392-50659df4264c/tool-results/bxqkex0bk.txt"\)
text=p.read_text\(encoding='utf-8',errors='replace'\).splitlines\(\)
current=None
funcs=[]
for line in text:
    if line.startswith\('diff --git '\):
        m=re.match\(r'diff --git a/\(.*?\) b/\(.*\)', line\)
        if m:
            current=m.group\(2\)
        continue
    if current and line.startswith\('+'\) and not line.startswith\('+++'\):
        l=line[1:]
        for pat in [r'^function\\s+\([A-Za-z0-9_]+\)\\s*\\\(', r'^const\\s+\([A-Za-z0-9_]+\)\\s*=\\s*\(?:async\\s*\)?\\\(', r'^const\\s+\([A-Za-z0-9_]+\)\\s*=\\s*async\\s*\\\(', r'^const\\s+\([A-Za-z0-9_]+\)\\s*=\\s*\\\([^\)]*\\\)\\s*=>', r'^async\\s+function\\s+\([A-Za-z0-9_]+\)\\s*\\\(']:
            m2=re.match\(pat,l.strip\(\)\)
            if m2:
                funcs.append\(\(current,m2.group\(1\),l.strip\(\)\)\)
                break
print\('Added function-like declarations:',len\(funcs\)\)
for f,n,s in funcs:
    print\(f'{f}: {n} :: {s[:120]}'\)
PY)
